reference: I have been married for about six weeks, and my husband and I have not used any contraceptives since we have both decided we are ready to start a family. My cycle is very regular, so we assumed we might get pregnant right away. I was thinking recently that I might be pregnant, so my question is this: can rough sexual activity during the very early stages of pregnancy possibly cause a miscarriage?
